cost_thresholds._comment: Tune per-workspace. Defaults err on the side of surfacing. Lower thresholds = more findings per run; raise them once the team has cleared baseline noise.

idle_definition._comment: A route is 'idle' if it received zero events in the lookback window. event_count_30d==0 AND last_event_at older than idle_warn_days = idle. Routes legitimately bursty (cron-driven sources firing once a quarter) should be exempted via a workspace override of lookback_days.

sink_cost_table._comment: Rough cost-per-event estimates by sink type. Used by the recommender to project monthly_run_rate = event_count_30d * sum(sink_cost_table[sink_type]). Operators should override with their actual contracted rates.
sink_cost_table._units: USD per event delivered (rough order of magnitude, not invoice-accurate)

company_glossary.route: A configured pipeline path from a source to one or more sinks. Defined in pipeline_routes table.
company_glossary.sink: A delivery destination (database, lake, queue, webhook). Defined in environment_sinks table.
company_glossary.source: An ingest origin (CDC bridge, SaaS connector, webhook receiver, direct push). Defined in workspace_sources table.
company_glossary.fan-out: Number of sinks attached to a single route. Multiplies per-event cost.
company_glossary.DLQ: Dead-letter queue. Failed sink deliveries land here instead of retrying infinitely.
company_glossary.run-rate: Projected monthly cost based on the trailing 30-day event count and per-sink cost table.
